books.title: The AI Agency Operating System
books.subtitle: Build, Track, Advertise, Convert — the complete framework for a productized, AI-native agency.
books.description: The complete operating system for building, pricing, and scaling an AI services business in 2026. Sixteen chapters across the Blueprint, Foundation, Architecture, Monetization, Execution, and Scale — every framework, deep dive, rate card, and action plan I use to run real B2B campaigns, from missed-call voice agents to $30k/month productized retainers. Includes 5 real-world case studies and a 3-month execution timeline.
whatYouLearn: The outcome-first positioning framework that makes business owners buy
The $1T automation gap and why midmarket businesses are the real opportunity
The Agency Triangle: Service, Client, Operations — and why missing one kills scale
Choosing your agency model: Custom ($3k–$10k), Productized ($999–$2.5k), or White-Label
The 7 high-paying niches for AI agencies and the 48-hour niche validation protocol
High-income AI services: voice agents, automations, and chatbots — full deep dives
The universal voice agent script template and inbound vs. outbound agent design
n8n vs. Make — when to use each — and the 5 automations every business needs
Chatbase vs. ManyChat vs. Voiceflow and the 3-layer handoff architecture
Value-based vs. cost-based pricing and the complete AI agency rate card
The $999 starter offer strategy and guarantee structures that reduce buyer risk
The 5 client acquisition channels and the 30-day first client playbook
The 5-phase discovery call framework and the PAIN qualification framework
Onboarding, 7-day delivery sprints, and the 3 rules of project communication
The 2026 AI agency tech stack directory and SOPs for every service
Scaling milestones to $10k and $30k/month, team structures, and the growth flywheel
5 real-world case studies and a 3-month startup execution timeline

chapters.title: WHAT IS AN AI AGENCY, REALLY?

faq.q: Is this for beginners or established agencies?
faq.a: Both. If you are starting, the Blueprint and Foundation parts give you the mental model and offer. If you are established, the Architecture, Execution, and Scale parts hand you the SOPs, pricing, and delivery systems that unlock the next tier.

faq.q: Do I need technical skills to build the AI services?
faq.a: No. The deep dives on voice agents, automations, and chatbots are written for builders using no-code/low-code tools like n8n, Make, and GoHighLevel. If you can follow a recipe, you can deliver these services.
An 85-page ebook plus a built-in premium reader with bookmarks, highlights, notes, dark mode, search, and progress tracking. Every framework and action plan is included.

faq.q: How long until I see results?
faq.a: Most readers complete the Chapter 1 action plan in the first week and run their first outreach by week two. First client typically lands in 30–60 days following the 30-day playbook.
Yes. If the frameworks do not pay for themselves in 30 days, email me and I will refund you in full. No forms, no friction.

highlights: Every framework, rate card & action plan included

books.title: The Prompt Engineering Bible
books.subtitle: From basics to production: the complete guide to making AI do real work.
books.description: The definitive guide to prompt engineering for builders. From first principles to production-grade prompt systems, chains, and evaluation loops.
whatYouLearn: The anatomy of a production-grade prompt
Chaining prompts into reliable systems
Evaluation loops that measure quality
Building a personal prompt library

faq.a: The principles are model-agnostic and work across all major LLMs.

books.title: Deep Work for Builders
books.subtitle: A focus system for makers who ship in a world built to distract them.
books.description: The modern focus system for people who build for a living. Reclaim deep work, design your environment for attention, and ship the work that actually matters.
whatYouLearn: Designing an environment for deep work
The builder's daily architecture
Killing the notifications that kill focus
Shipping rituals that beat resistance

faq.q: Is this just another productivity book?
faq.a: No. It is a system designed specifically for builders — people whose output is creative and whose enemy is fragmentation.

books.title: The Solo Scale Playbook
books.subtitle: How to grow a one-person business past six figures without hiring a team.
books.description: The exact playbook for staying solo and scaling anyway. Productize your offer, automate the busywork, and build a business that earns like a team but runs like a solopreneur.
whatYouLearn: Productizing a service so it sells while you sleep
Automation stacks that replace a junior hire
Pricing for leverage instead of hours
The 3-client model that replaces a full roster

faq.q: I already have clients. Will this help?
faq.a: Yes — the playbook is built for working solopreneurs who want fewer clients, higher rates, and more leverage.

faq.q: Do I need to know how to code to automate?
faq.a: No. Every automation uses no-code tools and clear recipes.

books.title: The $10K Month System
books.subtitle: A 90-day plan to your first consistent five-figure month as a solo operator.
books.description: A 90-day operating plan to reach and sustain a $10,000/month run rate. Week-by-week actions, the exact offers, and the math that makes it work.
whatYouLearn: The math of a $10k month
Offers priced to hit the number
A 90-day demand plan
The retention loop that locks it in

faq.a: For an established skill, yes. For a brand-new skill, expect 6 months using the same system.

books.title: Content OS
books.subtitle: The framework for turning content into a client pipeline that compounds.
books.description: A complete content operating system. Define your pillars, build a repeatable production engine, and turn every post into a step in your sales funnel.
whatYouLearn: The 4 content pillars that feed a pipeline
A production system that runs on schedule, not inspiration
Repurposing one idea into ten assets
The framework-first content strategy

faq.q: I am not a writer. Will this work?
faq.a: The system is built around frameworks and templates, not prose talent. AI handles first drafts; you refine.

books.title: Systems Thinking for Founders
books.subtitle: See the loops, leverage points, and bottlenecks that run your business.
books.description: A founder's guide to systems thinking. Learn to see your business as a set of loops, find the leverage points, and make changes that compound instead of changes that fade.
whatYouLearn: Reading your business as a system of loops
Finding leverage points that compound
Distinguishing fixes from fundamentals
Designing feedback into everything

faq.q: Is this too abstract for a busy founder?
faq.a: No — every concept is tied to a concrete business decision you have probably already faced.

books.title: Landing Pages That Convert
books.subtitle: The anatomy of pages that turn strangers into buyers.
books.description: A teardown-driven guide to high-converting landing pages. Learn the architecture of pages that sell, with annotated examples and a copy-and-paste framework.
whatYouLearn: The 7-block landing page architecture
Writing headlines that stop the scroll
Proof stacks that remove objections
The single-ask principle

faq.q: Do I need to know how to design?
faq.a: No. The framework works with any page builder.
